prestazioni: Engine: M157 DE55 AL (5.5L V8 Biturbo) – Full internal build with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.0:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Upgraded to a custom Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with 76mm compressor wheels, billet aluminum compressor housings, and T6 turbine housings (0.96 A/R) for optimized spool and top-end flow. Supporting mods include a Weistec high-flow fuel system with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 fuel pumps, 1,000cc ID1000 injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines.

Drivetrain: Reinforced 7G-Tronic AMG transmission with a Weistec Engineering TCU tune and upgraded torque converter (4,500 RPM stall). The transfer case is swapped for a custom Quaife ATB differential (front and rear) with 3.92:1 gearing, paired with a strengthened 4MATIC drivetrain using billet CV axles from The Driveshaft Shop (Stage 3, 1,000hp-rated). Clutch-type limited-slip differentials are installed at both ends, with a Drexler Motorsport LSD in the rear.

Suspension & Chassis: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover system (ML63-specific valving) with 800lb/in front springs and 700lb/in rear springs, adjustable camber plates, and spherical bearing top mounts. The subframe is reinforced with a Weistec Engineering chassis stiffening kit (front and rear strut tower braces, underbody X-brace, and differential mount brace). Braking is upgraded to a full AP Racing Radi-CAL kit with 405mm front rotors (two-piece, slotted), 380mm rear rotors, and six-piston front/four-piston rear calipers, paired with Ferodo DS3000 pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Prior Design ML63 AMG-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with integrated carbon fiber diffuser and rear wing (adjustable angle, 3D-printed airfoil). The kit widens the track by 60mm per side and requires custom 3D-printed inner fender liners for tire clearance.

Aero & Lighting: Full carbon fiber front splitter from Vorsteiner (ML63-specific, with integrated canards) and a custom rear diffuser from RW Carbon (dual-layer, with active Gurney flap). Lighting is upgraded to LUX H8 V4 LED headlights with adaptive projectors and a custom Morimoto XB35 LED fog light conversion. The grille is replaced with a 3D-printed AMG Panamericana-style mesh (carbon fiber, with active cooling flaps).

Wheels & Stance: Forged BBS FI-R wheels (21x10.5 ET25 front, 21x12.5 ET35 rear) with custom center locks and titanium hardware. Tires are Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (285/30/21 front, 325/25/21 rear) mounted on HRE FlowForm FF03 barrels. The suspension is set to a -35mm drop (front) and -30mm drop (rear) with aggressive camber (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear) for optimal track alignment. Fender flares are rolled and pulled with custom aluminum reinforcement plates.
